Package microui.core.style

Class AbstractColor

java.lang.Object
microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractLerpedColor, Color
public abstract class AbstractColor extends Object
Abstract base class for color representations in the MicroUI framework. Provides common functionality for applying colors to different drawing contexts and components. All color implementations should extend this class.

This class defines the standard interface for colors in MicroUI, including methods for applying colors as fills, strokes, backgrounds, and tints to both the main Processing context and PGraphics objects. It also integrates with the Metrics system for resource tracking.

See Also:

  • Metrics

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public final void apply()
      Applies this color as a fill to the main Processing context.

    • apply

      public final void apply(processing.core.PGraphics pGraphics)
      Applies this color as a fill to the specified PGraphics context.
      Parameters:
      pGraphics - the PGraphics context to apply the color to (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if pGraphics is null

    • applyStroke

      public final void applyStroke()
      Applies this color as a stroke to the main Processing context.

    • applyStroke

      public final void applyStroke(processing.core.PGraphics pGraphics)
      Applies this color as a stroke to the specified PGraphics context.
      Parameters:
      pGraphics - the PGraphics context to apply the color to (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if pGraphics is null

      public final void applyBackground()
      Applies this color as a background to the main Processing context.

      public final void applyBackground(processing.core.PGraphics pGraphics)

      Parameters:
      pGraphics - the PGraphics context to apply the color to (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if pGraphics is null

    • getRed

      public abstract int getRed()
      Returns the red component of this color.
      Returns:
      the red component value (0 - 255)

    • getGreen

      public abstract int getGreen()
      Returns the green component of this color.
      Returns:
      the green component value (0 - 255)

      public abstract int getBlue()
      Returns the blue component of this color.
      Returns:
      the blue component value (0 - 255)

    • getAlpha

      public abstract int getAlpha()
      Returns the alpha (transparency) component of this color.
      Returns:
      the alpha component value (0 - 255, where 0 is fully transparent)
